column1: Hey Drew, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you looking to book?
Either Cabo or Cancun, leaning slightly more towards Cancun but depends on the numbers
gotcha yea Cancun def cheaper out of the both
how many ppl in your group?
Ok yeah we'll do that then, probably around 10-16, the numbers are still in the air rn
wordd thats solid, we all from the same school?
word which school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
firee we had a few groups from CU last year, y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Haha nice, yeah hopefully within a week or 2 if that's ok, gotta see how much it's gunna cost and who's gunna be able to go
ok cool, i'll send what i have now but keep in mind pricing changes pretty often this time of year
cool if i send it through email? its a little long for text
yea whats the best email for you?
just sent that, lmk if it came through
Just got it, I'll take a look
bet, added in a discount in there for you too
Thanks, I'll send it to the group and see what they say
The prices look good but the links says check-in is on the 7th, our break starts on the 14th and goes that week, is it possible to update that
oh aight yea thats my b. pricing is the same rn tho either way. regardless of what day we start
once were ready to make your actual reservation, we'll set it for the 7th start date. or 8th, whichever works best for you
what youre lookin at now is a sample quote. more so to see the difference from the 4 night and 5 night
heres the Cacun 5 night for example https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/M8LKFNMUIZ
Drew brotha whats good brotha, how the squad lookin so far?
Hey man, the guys are on board so far, is that price for a set quantity or is it for however many people
yoyo, the price is based per person on a room occupancy basis. so like a 4 person room pice shows the price per each of the 4 ppl
Sounds great, if you throw something together we probably have about 20 going total, can you throw together a final quote for us
yoyo, yea. did we want to do 5 nights or 4? and is it Cancun?
yoo Drew whats good, lmk if we wanted to do 4 or 5 nights and i'll put this all together for you
ok dope, did we want to get that reservation set up?
bet! so 14-18, for 20 people grand oasis?
yoyo sending this over now, had a evening commute
yoo checkin in bro, were you guys able to access that reservation?
Yup, just working some stuff out with the guys really quick
word word. which airport we wanna fly out of? ill send over a couple options
word lookin like the best thing to do is adjust dates to the 15-19, or 16-20. to get the most affordable flights
yoo Drew what good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
yerr checkin in bro, did you guys plan on hopping on that reservation? operations is asking about the rooms
sup bro, did the group fade?
We had about 10 of the guys fade so there's only about 10 of us as of now
Not sure if that changes things
Nah all good, yall can still hop in on that reservation and I'll consolidate the spots afterward
yoyo whats the status we rollin with the 10?
if we're not sure I'll have to close down the reservation for now
We still plan on going, meeting up with everyone tomorrow during the holiday to finalize everything
Hey man, sorry for all the back and forth but it's looking pretty official with 17 people down to go, we can fill out the reservation tn and get the $200 deposit tomorrow if that works with you

One question though, what kind of benefit do we get booking through you guys instead of the hotel, I was looking it up and it seemed like it would actually be cheaper to go through the hotel, just curious
my dog, sounds good. and was it cheaper? I'll check that out asap, this is for Cancun right? Grand O
It was only like $60 cheaper so not a huge deal, was just curious since you said there was a discount on there too
worddd I'll check it out and see if theres anything we can do there. But yea overall its a way smoother experience with a tour operator. we specialize in large college group bookings like yours

when booking through the resort there no one to really talk to the same way we've been. and then when booking online youre typically maxed out at a certain amount of rooms, or like one room at a time, so theres no guarantee the cost will be the same for the next set of guys
and then typically you have to put everything down on one card. so someone would have to chase ppl around to pay them their money back lol
yessir, you get our on site staff too there to help you with check in and navigating the resort
Also, about grand oasis, I know a lot of places have clubs on site, I saw that GO has a beach club but do they have a club on site or host resort we can go to that isn't extra
yea there a night club bro. its not a miami nightclub by any means but gets the job done lol
I just did a quick search on their site and it looks like $140 more per person after taxes and fees. just gotta get all the way to the end checkout screen
Sounds good, just trying to see if we needed to account for covers like in the downtown part or not
we have a party pass option y'all could do. you can add it onto your package later on. up to 2 days before the trip, so you have time to decide
the party pass is for the nightclub venues off of the resort. comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, Rakata, Mandala, Vaquita, and a few more
Ok sounds good, we'll definitely check that out later on
Also, just to confirm dates, it would be the 4 nights from March 16-20
Sweet, is the reservation still accessible from the email sent a while back
yessir! same link, ill resend it as well
and its 17 guys right? we'll have to go with two rooms of 4 and three rooms of 3
It's a mix of guys and girls so I'm trying to figure out if guys and girls are ok with rooming together, ill lyk in a few minutes
okay bet bet yea we can arrange however needed

Ok potentially good news for you, not sure if you get commission or something but while trying to move rooms around to make it work, we ended up getting 15 extra people haha so we are up to 28 total so we can divide by 4, is this doable
Sorry for all the switching around but it's just been consolidating fraternity and sorority groups and such
Oh dope bro, yea happy to hook it up
I'll adjust the rooms now so there's 28 slots
If you could just let me know when that's available that'd be great so I can get everyone signed up
Sweet, also one other question, I'm seeing a lot about how there's different bands for different food options at the resort, do you know what that's about

There is one band that gets you access to like 2 more of the private restaurants. In my opinion it's not crazy worth it. But it's $50 a day if you ever want to try it. You can upgrade to it at the concierge desk
The main band you'll have is valid for everything else you need on the resort. There are specialty restaurants you can make reservations for
Guys are running into some issues, is there a way to switch rooms when you've already signed up
yea for sure I can switch those around easy
Do I need to give you names or is there a way to do it manually
just lmk what needs to be switched and I got you on the back end

Room 7: Carson Chastain Liam Kelly Gabe Ramirez Ella brown Room 9: Collin defats Jackson walker Jay claudell Connor Olsen Room 8: Ryan feather Matan Morris James Cowell Caleb Baker Room 3: Aria Goodwin Grace Nelson Brooke Bradbury Shea Martin
yoo what's good bro, how we lookin?
Looking good, I think we are gunna take off 1 of the rooms because they are signing up separately and then trying to get the last few stragglers signed up
okay bet. were they looking to do their own reservation?
Not too sure, I'll check with them, I think they were gunna be in room 6 though
Also, room 9 isn't showing any names, just TBA, was wondering if you would be able to update that
Yea the ppl you mentioned with James never joined
They got to hop on the link and create their accounts
One of the guys can't log into their account they created, anything u can do on your end?
His name is Connor Olsen and his email is Connorgo28@gmail.com
he may have used the incorrect email to log in
connorgo28@gmail.com is whats here too actually
is he forgetting his password or
I think so yeah, says he's trying to reset and it won't let him
so he can go back to the reservation screen, and press the join trip button next to his name
He's already on the reservation, he was trying to pay his deposit
Or do u mean he just has to start over
yea he'll technically start over but his information is already in that slot. hes just gonna create a new account
If he has to create a new account how's he gunna join the spot that his old account is in I guess is the question
Can you just delete his old account from his spot
And he can just make new account
yea all he just needs to do is select the join trip button next to his name and follow the steps. just has to remember the password he uses this time
One of our guys, Lucas Overbaugh is having trouble paying, it keeps saying he needs to sign the agreement but has a million times and has the confirmation email
I see the agreement is signed
mind having him screenshot what he see when he goes to pay? never heard of this happening before
And then it won't let him pay
hard for me to view videos on this sms texting platform my bad
mind having him screenshot where it stops him from paying? if I can't figure it out I'll let the ops team know first thing in the am
He submits the form and then it says "error 101"
And when he clicks "make a payment" it says error 404
word gonna send it to the ops team first thing in the morning and see whats up
Morning D, sent this to ops team will get it situated. worst case I'll send him a direct page to pay we'll apply it to his account
A couple other people are having the same issue too
But ok sounds good, just let me know
Word I just hit up the tech team again to see whats up. super odd
Yea are ppl still having that trouble? looks like Lucas was able to get his in if I'm not mistaken
yea his payment went through my b
Word I'll see if the other guys are able to
bet, if theyre still having troubles I'll send them another link to use. just lmk who they are
sup bro! hope the weekend was lit. checkin in on Finnegan and Connor O. they still rollin on the trip? they just havent deposited yet

Sorry about the delay, Connor O should have put his deposit down, Finn is still in the air because of some family issues but worst case scenario, I think we'll just split the cost of the extra bed space or find someone else to replace him
all good bro. yea we can replace Finn if you have someone, or we can make that room a 3 person room, pricing isnt a ton more for the guys
Connor O is all good yup

Hey man, making sure the guys are all paid up on spring break. We are still having an issue with Finn and if he'll be able to go, would it be ok if the guys pay their appropriate amount assuming we'll still have 4 and just pay their difference if he can't come later
Either way it will be paid, just might be different timing
yoyo! we got a few people behind, by a tad. and for Finn, right now is it more likely that he does go or doesnt go?
yo wb connor olsen he rollin with the squad still?
Finn gunna let me know by tn and I'll text Connor rn
Finn couldn't get ahold of his dad yesterday but will today, Connor is paid up
Aight bet thanks for the update bro
Finn is officially coming, he'll be paid up tonight
Quick question, what's the difference between the pyramid and the regular resort, are they the same
All on the same resort, the Pyramid is a specific building
like a college campus with different dorm halls
families and adults are typically at the pyramid

Word yeah I've just heard the pyramid is a bit nicer, any way of getting a room in there, we're all 21 and seniors so it's not like this is our first spring break or anything, not looking to be obnoxious or anything
I wanna say the pyramid is 25+ bro
I can double check. But last I made the request that's what I got
Ah damn, I mean yeah if you could check that'd be awesome but cool if not
yea lookin like its 25+. tbh at check in you can always try to just upgrade your wristband while youre there. they allow that daily
not sure exact price, think its $60 a day
hey whenever you have a sec, if you guys could upload your flight info so we can finalize your airport transfers
yoyo, A lot of you guys still missing your flight info, we can't get you your airport transfers without it
Sorry, totally spaced on your last text, I'll get the guys on it
Bet sounds good bro thank you
do you know if any of the guys are on the same flight as you? I can duplicate those in if so
Robby Toomey and Lucas Overbaugh have the same

Whats up, just wanted to check in and see if there was more information we needed leading up to the trip, was also wondering if it would be possible to get a confirmation from the actual hotel aside from just your service
Just wanted to check in again and see if we could get an official confirmation from the hotel, also if there was any additional info on the shuttle service and how that works

So couple things! first we wanna make sure that everyone in the group has their flight info uploaded to their accounts in the flight info tab so that we can set up their transportation to the airport. I see yours in there, theres just a few others we need
each persons arrival time is treated individually, our transportation team will be read for each of you when you land

Jameson Grace Liam Carson Collin Connor Jackson Ryan Matan Aidan Are the peeps we need flight info from. if you know any of them are on the same flight as you or anyone else just lmk and we can duplicate those in

Soon as we have all flight info, our ops team will release vouchers onto your accounts. those vouchers are your confirmations that you will screenshot and take with you on the trip. its like your proof of reservation. when you arrive, after being shuttled over to the resort, our team will be there to help you out with check in

As far as confirmation from the resort, since your reservation is on our pre-contracted room block, you wont get a traditional Grand Oasis email from the resort itself, like you would if you booked with a hotel like here at home for example. but if you want to call the resort to confirm just for clarity, youre more than welcome to, just lmk and I'll send the info you need

Sounds great, I just texted the stragglers that need to upload flights and they should have that done asap. Will our rooms be next to each other (room 1 next to room 2, etc) or will they be spaced out throughout the block

So room location is determined at the time of check in based on what the hotel front desk has clean and ready to go at the time you check in. While youre checking in, you can always ask for rooms to be as close together as possible
yoo! were you guys looking to add any of the party pass tickets to your package?
I think we'll pass on the add-ons, in terms of how much we need to bring in cash to check-in, is the $30 security deposit per person or room
its per person for the security deposit. and then theres a $14 per night sanitation / tourism fee mexico has. split amongst all of you
It says the sanitation tax is $10 and then there's a $17 environmental tax, is that true
And I'm assuming we would get the security deposit back at the end given nothing is broken or damaged, correct
the $30 security deposit for Grand Oasis is non refundable. and then the sanitation & environmental tax together is now $14 per night per room
yoyo are Aidan or Jackson on the same flight as anyone else in the group
They have another ride arranged apparently
aight bet so they dont need our ride at all? I'll let the team know what time-ish will the be geting to the resort? just so on site staff is ready for them
Hey so our flight got cancelled so 3 of us had to completely reschedule our flights, do we just re-enter our flight info or what since it's a full repurchase
Yo! Just scneeeshot the the new flight info so that we can upload it details and we'll
Are those good to go? Also Brooke Bradbury just texted you with her new flight as well
Airports are going crazy with cancelled flights
Updated ops team with all of this
I have another change from Ella unfortunately, here's her new info
Everything's great, we're just trying to see what clubs are worth going to and if girls can get discounts
